title: Intense Molten Spanish Vine Tomatoes Wrap
description: A tangy and molten Spanish dish featuring vine tomatoes, served in a ssam wrap, perfect for a solo lacto-vegetarian dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the vine tomatoes with olive oil, garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the tomatoes on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly caramelized.
While the tomatoes are roasting, toast the ssam wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Remove the tomatoes from the oven and sprinkle the manchego cheese over the top, returning the baking sheet to the oven for an additional 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle the chopped parsley and lemon juice over the top of the tomatoes.
To assemble the wrap, place the roasted tomatoes and cheese in the center of the toasted ssam wrap.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
